scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:status: echo 'Development servers status:' && ps aux | grep -E '(npm run dev|node server.js)' | grep -v grep || echo 'No development servers running'
scripts.dev:logs: echo 'Development servers are running in foreground. Check terminal output.'
scripts.dev:alt: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:simple: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix client && npm start --prefix server
scripts.deploy:manual: npm run build && cd server && NODE_ENV=production npm run db:migrate && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production
scripts.pm2:start: cd server && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && npm run db:migrate && echo 'Setup completed! Run npm run dev to start development servers.'
scripts.setup:safe: npm run backup-env && npm run setup
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run backup-env && npm run deploy
